title: Observability, Capacity, Flow Control, Alarms, and SLOs · Independent Type Trial
summary: An independent integration team receives different traffic, tenant, topology, schema, and failure constraints and transfers observability, capacity, flow control, alarms, and slos into a new messaging telemetry, capacity, and SLO evidence board. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of messaging telemetry, capacity, and SLO evidence board with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debuggin…
objectives: Instrument publish, confirm, return, route, deliver, process, ack, retry, dead-letter, and effect phases with bounded identities and causal links.
Interpret ready, unacknowledged, total, ingress, delivery, ack, redelivery, consumers, consumer capacity, connections, channels, and node resource metrics together.
Model arrival rate, service rate, concurrency, oldest age, burst, retry amplification, byte volume, and recovery time for capacity decisions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Message Flow Telemetry
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab messaging team handles case 2137 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to combine backlog state, oldest age, SLO, and resource alarms into bounded operations action; bound payload, buffer, and retained-ledger bytes; then close the channel while one acknowledgement decision is still pending. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Instrument publish, confirm, return, route, deliver, process, ack, retry, dead-letter, and effect phases with bounded identities and causal links.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Message Flow Telemetry.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for instrument publish, confirm, return, route, deliver, process, ack, retry, dead-letter, and effect phases with bounded identities and causal links. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Message Flow Telemetry, keep Message Flow Telemetry connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.

Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Define availability, acceptance, routing, processing latency, age, loss, duplicate, poison, recovery, and capacity SLOs with symptom and cause alerts.
